_source: Cloud Carbon Footprint methodology - AWSEmissionsFactors.ts. https://www.cloudcarbonfootprint.org/docs/methodology/#appendix-v-grid-emissions-factors. Units: kgCO2e per kWh.
_note: These are static annual averages. Real-time values via Electricity Maps API would be more accurate but require a paid token. Values are in kgCO2e/kWh; the CCF source stores the same data as mtCO2e/kWh (1000x smaller) — these values have been multiplied by 1000 to match the formula in calculator.py which expects kgCO2e/kWh.
